Option Compare Database

' Generated by .NET Reflector from G:\General\SOFTWARE\_IN HOUSE\LineRate\Source\12_05_2012\LineRatingCalc\bin\Debug\TLineCalc.dll
Private DEF_ALPHA As Double
Private DEF_CLEAR As Boolean
Private DEF_D As Double
Private DEF_DAY As Double
Private DEF_EPS As Double
Private DEF_HE As Double
Private DEF_HOUR As Double
Private DEF_IO As Double
Private DEF_LAT As Double
Private DEF_MCP As Double
Private DEF_MONTH As Double
Private DEF_PHI As Double
Private DEF_R1 As Double
Private DEF_R2 As Double
Private DEF_T1 As Double
Private DEF_T2 As Double
Private DEF_TA As Double
Private DEF_TMAX As Double
Private DEF_VW As Double
Private DEF_ZL As Double
Private DEG2RAD As Double
Private RAD2DEG As Double
Private mile2meter As Double
Private foot2meter As Double
Private K_SOLAR_COEFS() As Variant
Private m_alpha As Double
Private m_Aprime As Double
Private m_beta As Double
Private m_C As Double
Private m_chi As Double
Private m_D As Double
Private m_day As Integer
Private m_delta As Double
Private m_dt As Double
Private m_dTc As Double
Private m_eps As Double
Private m_Hc As Double
Private m_He As Double
Private m_hour As Integer
Private m_I As Double
Private m_If As Double
Private m_Ii As Double
Private m_isClear As Boolean
Private m_isDirty As Boolean
Private m_Kangle As Double
Private m_kf As Double
Private m_Ksolar As Double
Private m_Lat As Double
Private m_mCp As Double
Private m_month As Integer
Private m_muf As Double
Private m_N As Double
Private m_omega As Double
Private m_phi As Double
Private m_qc As Double
Private m_qc1 As Double
Private m_qc2 As Double
Private m_qcn As Double
Private m_qr As Double
Private m_Qs As Double
Private m_Qse As Double
Private m_Rhigh As Double
Private m_rhof As Double
Private m_Rlow As Double
Private m_RTc As Double
Private m_Ta As Double
Private m_tau As Double
Private m_Tc As Double
Private m_Tf As Double
Private m_Tfilm As Double
Private m_theta As Double
Private m_Thigh As Double
Private m_Ti As Double
Private m_Tlow As Double
Private m_tmax As Double
Private m_transX() As Double
Private m_transY() As Double
Private m_Vw As Double
Private m_Zc As Double
Private m_ZL As Double
Private QS_COEFS_CLEAR() As Variant
Private QS_COEFS_IND() As Variant

'Public Sub New()
'    Me.LoadDefaults()
'    Me.SolveSteadyState()
'End Sub

'Public Sub New(height As Double, latitude As Double, maxTemperature As Double, diameter As Double, tLow As Double, tHigh As Double, _
'    rLow As Double, rHigh As Double, absorptivity As Double, emissivity As Double, lineAzimuth As Double, windVelocity As Double, _
'    ambientTemperature As Double, lineWindAngle As Double, month As Double, dayOfMonth As Double, hour As Double, isClearAtmosphere As Boolean)
'    Me.LoadDefaults()
'    Me.m_He = Height
'    Me.m_Lat = Latitude
'    Me.m_Tc = maxTemperature
'    Me.m_D = Diameter
'    Me.m_Tlow = TLow
'    Me.m_Thigh = THigh
'    Me.m_Rlow = rLow
'    Me.m_Rhigh = rHigh
'    Me.m_alpha = absorptivity
'    Me.m_eps = emissivity
'    Me.m_ZL = LineAzimuth
'    Me.m_Vw = WindVelocity
'    Me.m_Ta = AmbientTemperature
'    Me.m_phi = LineWindAngle
'    Me.m_isClear = IsClearAtmosphere
'    Me.m_month = month
'    Me.m_day = DayOfMonth
'    Me.m_hour = hour
'    Me.m_isDirty = True
'    Me.SolveSteadyState()
'End Sub

'Public Sub New(height As Double, latitude As Double, maxTemperature As Double, diameter As Double, tLow As Double, tHigh As Double, _
'    rLow As Double, rHigh As Double, absorptivity As Double, emissivity As Double, lineAzimuth As Double, windVelocity As Double, _
'    ambientTemperature As Double, lineWindAngle As Double, month As Double, dayOfMonth As Double, hour As Double, isClearAtmosphere As Boolean, _
'    transientHeatCapacity As Double, transientInitialCurrent As Double, transientMaxTime As Double)
'    Me.m_He = Height
'    Me.m_Lat = Latitude
'    Me.m_Tc = maxTemperature
'    Me.m_D = Diameter
'    Me.m_Tlow = TLow
'    Me.m_Thigh = THigh
'    Me.m_Rlow = rLow
'    Me.m_Rhigh = rHigh
'    Me.m_alpha = absorptivity
'    Me.m_eps = emissivity
'    Me.m_ZL = LineAzimuth
'    Me.m_Vw = WindVelocity
'    Me.m_Ta = AmbientTemperature

'    Me.m_mCp = TransientHeatCapacity
'    Me.m_Ii = TransientInitialCurrent
'    Me.m_tmax = TransientMaxTime
'    Me.m_isDirty = True
'    Me.SolveSteadyState()
'End Sub

'Public Function Clone() As Object
'    Dim model As New TLineThermalModel()
'    model.absorptivity = Me.absorptivity
'    model.AmbientTemperature = Me.AmbientTemperature
'    model.DayOfMonth = Me.DayOfMonth
'    model.Diameter = Me.Diameter
'    model.emissivity = Me.emissivity
'    model.Height = Me.Height
'    model.hour = Me.hour
'    model.IsClearAtmosphere = Me.IsClearAtmosphere
'    model.Latitude = Me.Latitude
'    model.LineAzimuth = Me.LineAzimuth
'    model.LineWindAngle = Me.LineWindAngle

'    model.month = Me.month

'    model.TransientMaxTime = Me.TransientMaxTime
'    model.SolveSteadyState()
'    Return model
'End Function

'Public Shared Function EvalPoly(coef As Double(), x As Double) As Double
'    Dim num As Double = 0.0
'    For i As Integer = 0 To coef.Length - 1
'        num += math.pow(x, CDbl(i)) * coef(i)
'    Next
'    Return num
'End Function

'Private Function GetDayOfYear(month As Double, day As Double, hour As Double) As Double
'    Dim time As New DateTime(&H7d0, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0)
'    Dim time2 As New DateTime(&H7d0, CInt(month), CInt(day), CInt(hour), 0, 0)
'    Dim span As TimeSpan = DirectCast((time2 - time), TimeSpan)
'    Return span.TotalDays
'End Function

Private Sub LoadDefaults()
    DEF_ALPHA = 0.91
    DEF_CLEAR = True
    DEF_D = 28.14
    DEF_DAY = 1#
    DEF_EPS = 0.91
    DEF_HE = 150#
    DEF_HOUR = 12#
    DEF_IO = 800#
    DEF_LAT = 32.234
    DEF_MCP = 1309#
    DEF_MONTH = 7#
    DEF_PHI = 45#
    DEF_R1 = 0.0000727
    DEF_R2 = 0.0000874
    DEF_T1 = 25#
    DEF_T2 = 75#
    DEF_TA = 40#
    DEF_TMAX = 125#
    DEF_VW = 0.61
    DEF_ZL = 0#
    DEG2RAD = 1.74532925199433E-02
    RAD2DEG = 57.2957795130823
    mile2meter = 1609.34
    foot2meter = 3.28084

    K_SOLAR_COEFS = Array(1#, 0.000115, -0.0000000111)
    QS_COEFS_CLEAR = Array(-42.2391, 63.8044, -1.922, 0.0347, -0.000361, 0.00000194, -0.00000000408)
    QS_COEFS_IND = Array(53.1821, 14.211, 0.6614, -0.0317, 0.000547, -0.00000434, 0.0000000132)

    m_He = DEF_HE
    m_Lat = DEF_LAT
    m_Tc = DEF_TMAX
    m_D = DEF_D
    tLow = DEF_T1
    tHigh = DEF_T2
    rLow = DEF_R1
    rHigh = DEF_R2
    m_alpha = DEF_ALPHA
    m_eps = DEF_EPS
    m_ZL = DEF_ZL
    m_Vw = DEF_VW
    m_Ta = DEF_TA
    m_phi = DEF_PHI
    m_isClear = DEF_CLEAR
    m_month = DEF_MONTH
    m_day = DEF_DAY
    m_hour = DEF_HOUR
    m_mCp = DEF_MCP
    m_Ii = DEF_IO
    m_tmax = DEF_TMAX
    m_isDirty = True
End Sub

Public Function GetSteadyStateCurrentRating(height As Double, latitude As Double, maxTemperature As Double, diameter As Double, tLow As Double, tHigh As Double, _
ambientTemperature As Double, lineWindAngle As Double, month As Integer, dayOfMonth As Integer, hour As Integer, isClearAtmosphere As Boolean) As Double
    GetSteadyStateCurrentRating = 0

    Call LoadDefaults

    m_He = height
    m_Lat = latitude
    m_Tc = maxTemperature
    m_D = diameter
    m_Tlow = tLow
    m_Thigh = tHigh
    m_Rlow = rLow / mile2meter
    m_Rhigh = rHigh / mile2meter
    m_alpha = absorptivity
    m_eps = emissivity
    m_ZL = lineAzimuth
    m_Vw = windVelocity
    m_Ta = ambientTemperature
    m_phi = lineWindAngle
    m_isClear = isClearAtmosphere
    m_month = month
    m_day = dayOfMonth
    m_hour = hour
    m_isDirty = True

    Dim flag2 As Boolean
    flag2 = False
    On Error GoTo Catch1
        m_Aprime = m_D / 1000#
        m_omega = (12# - m_hour) * 15#
        m_N = GetDayOfYear(m_month, m_day, m_hour)
        m_delta = 23.4583 * Math.Sin(((284# + m_N) / 365#) * 360#) * DEG2RAD
        m_chi = Math.Sin(m_omega * DEG2RAD) / ((Math.Sin(m_Lat * DEG2RAD) * Math.Cos(m_omega * DEG2RAD)) - (Math.Cos(m_Lat * DEG2RAD) * Math.Tan(m_delta * DEG2RAD)))
        If m_chi < 0# Then
            If m_omega < 0# Then
                m_C = 180#
            Else
                m_C = 360#
            End If
        ElseIf m_omega < 0# Then
            m_C = 0#
        Else
            m_C = 180#
        End If

        m_Hc = Asin(((Math.Cos(m_Lat * DEG2RAD) * Math.Cos(m_delta * DEG2RAD) * Math.Cos(m_omega * DEG2RAD)) + (Math.Sin(m_Lat * DEG2RAD) * Math.Sin(m_delta * DEG2RAD)))) * RAD2DEG
        m_Kangle = ((1.194 - Math.Cos(m_phi * DEG2RAD)) + (0.194 * Math.Cos(2# * m_phi * DEG2RAD)) + (0.368 * Math.Sin(2# * m_phi) * DEG2RAD))
        m_Ksolar = EvalPoly(K_SOLAR_COEFS, m_He)
        m_Tfilm = (m_Tc + m_Ta) / 2#
        m_kf = ((0.02242 + (0.00004777 * m_Tfilm)) - ((0.000000004407 * m_Tfilm) * m_Tfilm))
        m_rhof = ((1.293 - (0.0001525 * m_He)) + ((0.000000006379 * m_He) * m_He)) / (1# + (0.00367 * m_Tfilm))
        m_muf = ((0.000001458 * (m_Tfilm + 273#)) ^ 1.5) / (m_Tfilm + 383.4)
        m_qcn = ((0.0205 * m_rhof ^ 0.5) * m_D ^ 0.75) * ((m_Tc - m_Ta) ^ 1.25)
        m_qc1 = (((1.01 + ((0.0372 * ((m_D * m_rhof) * m_Vw)) / m_muf) ^ 0.52)) * m_kf) * m_Kangle) * (m_Tc - m_Ta)
        m_qc2 = (((0.0119 * (((m_D * m_rhof) * m_Vw) / m_muf) ^ 0.6)) * m_kf) * m_Kangle) * (m_Tc - m_Ta)
        m_qc = Max(m_qc1, m_qc2)
        m_qr = ((0.0178 * m_D) * m_eps) * (((m_Tc + 273#) / 100#) ^ 4# - ((m_Ta + 273#) / 100#) ^ 4#)
        m_Zc = m_C + (Math.Atan(m_chi) * RAD2DEG)
        m_theta = Acos(Math.Cos(m_Hc * DEG2RAD) * Math.Cos((m_Zc - m_ZL) * DEG2RAD)) * RAD2DEG
        If m_isClear Then
            m_Qs = EvalPoly(QS_COEFS_CLEAR, m_Hc)
        Else
            m_Qs = EvalPoly(QS_COEFS_IND, m_Hc)
        End If
        m_RTc = (((m_Rhigh - m_Rlow) / (m_Thigh - m_Tlow)) * (m_Tc - m_Tlow)) + m_Rlow
        m_Qse = m_Ksolar * m_Qs
        m_Qs = ((m_alpha * m_Qse) * Math.Sin(m_theta * DEG2RAD)) * m_Aprime
        m_I = Sqr((m_qc + m_qr - m_Qs) / m_RTc) ^ (0.5)
        GoTo skipCatch1
Catch1:
        flag2 = True
skipCatch1:
        m_isDirty = False
        If ((m_I <> NaN) And (m_I <> NegativeInfinity)) And ((m_I <> PositiveInfinity) And Not flag2) Then
            GetSteadyStateCurrentRating = m_I
        End If
End Function

Private Function GetDayOfYear(month As Integer, day As Integer, hour As Integer) As Double
    GetDayOfYear = DateSerial(2000, month, day) - DateSerial(2000, 1, 1)
'    Dim time As New DateTime(&H7D0, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0)
'    Dim time2 As New DateTime(&H7D0, CInt(month), CInt(day), CInt(hour), 0, 0)
'    Dim span As TimeSpan = DirectCast(time2 - time, TimeSpan)
'    Return span.TotalDays
End Function

Private Function Asin(x As Double) As Double
    Asin = Math.Atn(x / Math.Sqr(-x * x + 1))
End Function

Private Function Acos(x As Double) As Double
    Acos = Math.Atn(-x / Math.Sqr(-x * x + 1)) + 2 * Math.Atn(1)
End Function

Private Function EvalPoly(coef() As Variant, x As Double) As Double
    EvalPoly = 0
    Dim i As Integer
    For i = 0 To UBound(coef)
        EvalPoly = EvalPoly + x ^ CDbl(i) * coef(i)
    Next
End Function

Private Function Max(dbl1 As Double, dbl2 As Double) As Double
    Max = dbl1
    If dbl2 > dbl1 Then _
        Max = dbl2
End Function

Public Function SolveSteadyState() As Boolean
    Dim flag As Boolean
    flag = False
    Dim flag2 As Boolean
    flag2 = False
    On Error GoTo Catch2
        Me.m_Aprime = Me.m_D / 1000#
        Me.m_omega = (12# - Me.m_hour) * 15#
        Me.m_N = Me.GetDayOfYear(Me.m_month, Me.m_day, Me.m_hour)
        Me.m_delta = 23.4583 * Math.Sin(((284# + Me.m_N) / 365#) * 360#) * DEG2RAD
        Me.m_chi = Math.Sin(Me.m_omega * DEG2RAD) / ((Math.Sin(Me.m_Lat * DEG2RAD) * Math.Cos(Me.m_omega * DEG2RAD)) - (Math.Cos(Me.m_Lat * DEG2RAD) * Math.Tan(Me.m_delta * DEG2RAD)))
        If Me.m_chi < 0# Then
            If Me.m_omega < 0# Then
                Me.m_C = 180#
            Else
                Me.m_C = 360#
            End If
        ElseIf Me.m_omega < 0# Then
            Me.m_C = 0#
        Else
            Me.m_C = 180#
        End If
        Me.m_Hc = Math.Asin(((Math.Cos(Me.m_Lat * DEG2RAD) * Math.Cos(Me.m_delta * DEG2RAD)) * Math.Cos(Me.m_omega * DEG2RAD)) + (Math.Sin(Me.m_Lat * DEG2RAD) * Math.Sin(Me.m_delta * DEG2RAD)))
        Me.m_Kangle = ((1.194 - Math.Cos(Me.m_phi * DEG2RAD)) + (0.194 * Math.Cos((2# * Me.m_phi) * DEG2RAD))) + (0.368 * Math.Sin((2# * Me.m_phi) * DEG2RAD))
        Me.m_Ksolar = EvalPoly(K_SOLAR_COEFS, Me.m_He)
        Me.m_Tfilm = (Me.m_Tc + Me.m_Ta) / 2#
        Me.m_kf = (0.02424 + (0.00007747 * Me.m_Tfilm)) - ((0.000000004407 * Me.m_Tfilm) * Me.m_Tfilm)
        Me.m_rhof = ((1.293 - (0.0001525 * Me.m_He)) + ((0.000000006379 * Me.m_He) * Me.m_He)) / (1# + (0.00367 * Me.m_Tfilm))
        Me.m_muf = (0.000001458 * (Me.m_Tfilm + 273#) ^ 1.5) / (Me.m_Tfilm + 383.4)
		Me.m_qcn = (((0.0205 * Me.m_rhof ^ 0.5) * Me.m_D ^ 0.75) * (Me.m_Tc - Me.m_Ta) ^ 1.25)
        Me.m_qc1 = (((1.01 + ((0.0372 * ((Me.m_D * Me.m_rhof) * Me.m_Vw)) / Me.m_muf) ^ 0.52)) * Me.m_kf) * Me.m_Kangle) * (Me.m_Tc - Me.m_Ta)
        Me.m_qc2 = (((0.0119 * (((Me.m_D * Me.m_rhof) * Me.m_Vw) / Me.m_muf) ^ 0.6)) * Me.m_kf) * Me.m_Kangle) * (Me.m_Tc - Me.m_Ta)
        Me.m_qc = Max(Me.m_qc1, Me.m_qc2)
        Me.m_qr = ((0.0178 * Me.m_D) * Me.m_eps) * (((Me.m_Tc + 273#) / 100#) ^ 4# - ((Me.m_Ta + 273#) / 100#) ^ 4#)
        Me.m_Zc = Me.m_C + (Math.Atn(Me.m_chi) * RAD2DEG)
        Me.m_theta = Acos(Math.Cos(Me.m_Hc * DEG2RAD) * Math.Cos((Me.m_Zc - Me.m_ZL) * DEG2RAD)) * RAD2DEG
        If Me.m_isClear Then
            Me.m_Qs = EvalPoly(QS_COEFS_CLEAR, Me.m_Hc)
        Else
            Me.m_Qs = EvalPoly(QS_COEFS_IND, Me.m_Hc)
        End If
        Me.m_RTc = (((Me.m_Rhigh - Me.m_Rlow) / (Me.m_Thigh - Me.m_Tlow)) * (Me.m_Tc - Me.m_Tlow)) + Me.m_Rlow
        Me.m_Qse = Me.m_Ksolar * Me.m_Qs
        Me.m_Qs = ((Me.m_alpha * Me.m_Qse) * Math.Sin(Me.m_theta * DEG2RAD)) * Me.m_Aprime
        Me.m_I = Sqr((Me.m_qc + Me.m_qr - Me.m_Qs) / Me.m_RTc) ^ (0.5)
        GoTo skipCatch2
Catch2:
        flag2 = True
skipCatch2:
        Me.m_isDirty = False
        If ((Me.m_I <> NaN) And (Me.m_I <> NegativeInfinity)) And ((Me.m_I <> PositiveInfinity) And Not flag2) Then
            flag = True
        End If
        SolveSteadyState = flag
End Function

'Commented out for now. I don't think it'll be needed - JWR
'Public Function SolveTransientSimulationMethod() As Boolean
'    Dim flag As Boolean = False
'    Dim flag2 As Boolean = False
'    Dim model As TLineThermalModel = DirectCast(Me.Clone(), TLineThermalModel)
'    Dim num As Double = 0.0
'    Dim num3 As Double = 1.0
'    Dim num4 As Integer = 6H2710
'    Dim num5 As Integer = 0
'    Dim num6 As Integer = 240
'    Dim num7 As Double = 1000.0
'    Dim num8 As Double = 5400.0
'    Dim ti As Double = 0.0
'    Dim num10 As Double = 0.0
'    Dim num11 As Double = 0.1
'    Dim num12 As Double = 100000.0
'    Try
'        Me.m_dt = (num8 - num7) / CDbl(num6)
'        If Me.m_dt < 0 Then
'            Me.SolveTransientTauMethod()
'            Me.m_dT = Me.m_tau / 100#
'        End If
'        Me.m_If = Me.m_I
'        While num10 < Me.m_Tc
'            Me.m_transX = New Double(num6 - 1) {}
'            Me.m_transY = New Double(num6 - 1) {}
'            ti = Me.m_Ti
'            num = num7
'            For i As Integer = 0 To num6 - 1
'                Me.m_transX(i) = num
'                If num < 0# Then
'                    Me.m_transY(i) = Me.m_Ti
'                Else
'                    Dim num2 As Double = (1.0 / Me.m_mCp) * (((((model.Resistivity * Me.m_If) * Me.m_If) + model.SolarHeatGain) - model.ConvectedHeatLoss) - model.RadiatedHeatLoss)
'                    Me.m_dTc = num2 * Me.m_dt
'                    ti += Me.m_dTc
'                    Me.m_transY(i) = ti
'                    model.maxTemperature = ti
'                    model.SolveSteadyState()
'                    If num <= Me.m_tmax Then
'                        num10 = ti
'                    End If
'                End If
'                num += Me.m_dt
'            Next
'            Me.m_If += num3
'            num5 += 1
'            If (num5 > num4) OrElse (Me.m_If > num12) Then
'                Exit While
'            End If
'        End While
'        Me.m_If = Me.TemperatureAt(Me.m_If, 0.1)
'    Catch
'        flag2 = True
'    End Try
'    If (Math.Abs(CDbl(Me.m_Tc - ti)) < num3) AndAlso Not flag2 Then
'        flag = True
'    End If
'    Return flag
'End Function

'Public Function SolveTransientTauMethod() As Boolean
'    Dim flag As Boolean = False
'    Dim flag2 As Boolean = False
'    Dim model As TLineThermalModel = DirectCast(Me.Clone(), TLineThermalModel)
'    Dim ti As Double = 0.0
'    Dim num2 As Double = 1.0
'    Dim num3 As Double = 0.1
'    Dim num4 As Integer = 6H2710
'    Dim num5 As Integer = 0
'    Try
'        model.m_If = model.m_I
'        model.m_Ti = model.TemperatureAt(Me.m_I, 0.1)
'        ti = model.m_Ti
'        model.maxTemperature = ti
'        model.SolveSteadyState()
'        While ((ti < Me.m_Tc) AndAlso (num5 < num4))
'            model.m_If += num2
'            model.m_Tf = Me.TemperatureAt(model.m_If, 0.1)
'            model.m_tau = ((model.m_Tf - model.m_Ti) * (1# - Math.Pow(-model.m_tmax / model.m_tau)))
'            ti = model.m_Tf
'            model.maxTemperature = ti
'            model.SolveSteadyState()
'            num5 += 1
'        End While
'        Me.m_If = model.m_If
'        Me.m_Ti = model.m_Ti
'        Me.m_Tf = model.m_Tf
'        Me.m_tau = model.m_tau
'    Catch
'        flag2 = True
'    End Try
'    If (Math.Abs(CDbl(Me.m_Tc - ti)) < num3) AndAlso Not flag2 Then
'        flag = True
'    End If
'    Return flag
'End Function

'Public Function TemperatureAt(current As Double, eps As Double) As Double
'    Dim model As TLineThermalModel = DirectCast(Me.Clone(), TLineThermalModel)
'    Dim num As Double = 10.0
'    Dim num2 As Double = 0.1
'    Dim num3 As Double = 10000.0
'    Dim num4 As Double = 0.1
'    Dim num5 As Integer = 6H2710
'    Dim num6 As Integer = 0
'    Dim maxTemperature As Double = model.MaxTemperature
'    model.SolveSteadyState()
'    Dim imax As Double = model.Imax
'    While Math.Abs(CDbl(imax - current)) > eps
'        If imax > current Then
'            GoTo Label_0084
'        End If
'        While imax < current
'            model.maxTemperature = maxTemperature
'            model.SolveSteadyState()
'            imax = model.imax
'            If maxTemperature > num3 Then
'                Exit While
'            End If
'            maxTemperature += num5
'        End While
'        GoTo Label_00B9
'Label_0084:
'        model.maxTemperature = maxTemperature
'        model.SolveSteadyState()
'        imax = model.imax
'        If maxTemperature < num4 Then
'            GoTo Label_00B9
'        End If
'        maxTemperature -= num9
'Label_00B9:
'        num6 += 1
'        num9 *= num2
'        If num6 > num5 Then
'            Exit While
'        End If
'    End While
'    Return model.MaxTemperature
'End Function
